---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new use case
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**The use case**
Describe the approval scenario you're trying to support, in the "As a … I want
to … so that …" form where possible.

**What you've tried**
How you'd model it today, and where the engine falls short.

**Proposed direction (optional)**
Any API or behavior you have in mind. Remember the engine aims to be a
mechanism, not business logic — host apps own domain decisions.
